generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance VedderElectronicSpeedController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electronic speed controller driving the motor of the 1/10‑scale autonomous vehicle"
]

instance SteeringServo : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Servo actuator controlling wheel steering direction on the vehicle chassis"
]

instance MotorDriverCircuitry : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Underlying motor driver circuitry that accepts voltage commands generated by the DT"
]

// C4: Physical-to-virtual interaction (Data Transmitted)
instance LiDARPointCloudTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom HokuyoUST110LXLiDAR
]

instance DepthImageTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera
]

instance SpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VehicleSpeedSensor
]

instance SteeringAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SteeringAngleSensor
]

// C3: Physical sensing components
instance HokuyoUST110LXLiDAR : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Hokuyo UST‑110LX 2‑D LiDAR providing point‑cloud data for the DT",
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted
]

instance IntelRealSenseD435iDepthCamera : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Intel RealSense D435i depth camera delivering RGB‑D images",
    DTDFVocab:producedData DepthImageTransmitted
]

instance VehicleSpeedSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On‑board speed sensor reporting the ego‑vehicle speed",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SteeringAngleSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Steering‑angle sensor providing the current wheel angle",
    DTDFVocab:producedData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted
]

// C10: Data
instance LiDARPointCloudData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Timestamped point‑cloud generated by the Hokuyo LiDAR",
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance DepthImageData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Depth image (RGB‑D) from the Intel RealSense camera",
    DTDFVocab:fromData DepthImageTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance VehicleSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Ego‑vehicle speed measurement",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

instance SteeringAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Current steering wheel angle",
    DTDFVocab:fromData SteeringAngleDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataMonitoringEnabler
]

// C10: Models
instance DBSCANPointCloudClusteringModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "DBSCAN‑based point‑cloud clustering model processing LiDAR data",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance KalmanFilterTrackingModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kalman‑filter tracker generating object tracks from clustered points",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataProcessingEnabler
]

instance ACCControllerModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Adaptive Cruise Control controller conforming to ISO 15622 class I",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ACCComputationEnabler
]

instance ThreeDVisualizationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3‑D visualisation model rendering vehicle state and predicted path",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance ROS2MiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "ROS 2 middleware providing communication for all functional entities",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService,
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService,
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataProcessingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler that runs clustering and tracking algorithms on incoming sensor data",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance ACCComputationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler executing the ACC controller model and returning desired speed",
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance VisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler delivering 3‑D visualisation results to the UI",
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

// C6: Services
instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time UI visualisation of speed, steering angle, object tracks and projected path with reporting",
    DTDFVocab:provides SpeedInsight,
    DTDFVocab:provides SteeringAngleInsight,
    DTDFVocab:provides ObjectTracksInsight,
    DTDFVocab:provides ProjectedPathInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Execution of the ACC algorithm in the DT and return of the desired speed",
    DTDFVocab:provides ACCDecisionAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "UI‑driven commands to enable/disable ACC, adjust speed set‑point, and trigger emergency braking",
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction,
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustSpeedSetpointAction,
    DTDFVocab:provides EmergencyBrakingAction
]

// C17: Insights
instance SpeedInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time display of the vehicle's current speed"
]

instance SteeringAngleInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time display of the steering wheel angle"
]

instance ObjectTracksInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualization of tracked objects generated by the Kalman‑filter tracker"
]

instance ProjectedPathInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Projected future path of the vehicle based on current motion state"
]

// C17: Actions
instance ACCDecisionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Desired speed decision generated by the ACC controller",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator command to enable or disable the ACC function",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance AdjustSpeedSetpointAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator adjustment of the ACC speed set‑point",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Operator‑triggered emergency braking command",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The DT sends control commands back to the PT over the same Wi‑Fi link: the ACC controller computes a desired speed and transmits it to the Actuation FE, which converts it into motor voltage; remote‑management commands (enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, emergency brake) are also issued from the User Interface FE to the Physical Twin Entity."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The DT operates in real‑time with a maximum end‑to‑end network latency of 100 ms and clock synchronisation accuracy of 100 ms across all entities, satisfying the 3GPP 22.185 latency requirement for V2V communications."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system orchestrates the Physical Twin Entity (sensors, actuators, point‑cloud processing), the Digital Twin Entity (data collection, ACC, reporting, visualization pre‑processing), the User Entity (3‑D UI and control panel), and a Cross‑System Data Translation FE that mediates ROS 2 intra‑entity communication and Wi‑Fi inter‑entity links, following the ISO 23247 entity‑based reference architecture."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The DT is instantiated for the operational stage of the vehicle, supporting runtime monitoring, remote control and performance troubleshooting; it is also employed during development for test‑bed experimentation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity is ensured by using high‑resolution LiDAR and depth camera data, real‑time processing pipelines, and adherence to ISO 15622 ACC specifications; validity is monitored through a 100 ms latency bound, 100 ms clock sync, and continuous UI reporting to detect divergences between virtual and physical states."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Physical‑to‑virtual and virtual‑to‑physical communication uses a Wi‑Fi network with ROS 2 message passing; a Data Translation Functional Entity performs serialization, message‑type alignment and unit conversion, providing a standardized interface as required by R1."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin Entity and User Entity reside on external compute (e.g., a workstation or cloud server) separate from the vehicle; the Physical Twin Entity runs on the vehicle’s NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano and associated microcontrollers; each entity is packaged as a ROS 2 node set."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The architecture follows ISO 23247 (Digital Twin Manufacturing Framework) for entity and functional decomposition, uses ISO 15622 for ACC functional requirements, references ISO/IEC 30173 for digital‑twin terminology, and optionally mentions OPC UA as a possible protocol for Data Translation."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safety is addressed by complying with ISO 15622 ACC performance class I, enforcing a ≤100 ms communication latency, maintaining clock synchronisation within 100 ms, and incorporating a human‑in‑the‑loop operator; explicit security mechanisms such as authentication or encryption are not described in the document."
]
